items.title: Trump makes a fresh case for White House ballroom after shooting incident at dinner event
items.summary: Mr. Trump slammed the petitioner in the case, contending that she had absolutely no standing to bring such a suit and it must be dropped immediately
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes in Lebanon, as Iran Talks Remain on Hold
items.summary: Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.
